emails.subject: EOL Deals
emails.body: Tana- Just wanted to follow up with you and see if you have found anything out. Thanks. Julie Forwarded by Julie Brewer/NA/Enron on 03/14/2001 01:52 PM Enron North America Corp. From: Julie Brewer 03/09/2001 03:00 PM

emails.subject: EOL Deals
emails.body: Tana- Just wanted to follow up with you and see if you have found anything out. Thanks. Julie Forwarded by Julie Brewer/NA/Enron on 03/14/2001 01:52 PM Enron North America Corp. From: Julie Brewer 03/09/2001 03:00 PM

emails.subject: Re: EOL Deals
emails.body: Re: EOL Deals Sorry about not getting back to you sooner. I am in Calgary this week. Stephanie and I met with Mark Taylor about this on Monday, and he said to go ahead and confirm this under the Houston master with Hess Energy Trading Company LLC. Julie Brewer@ENRON 03/14/01 01:52 PM
